scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run typecheck:mobile
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:api && npm run typecheck:mobile
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:mobile
scripts.deploy:staging: npm run build:api && npx serverless deploy --stage staging --region ca-central-1
scripts.deploy:web:staging: set EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=https://3ijwda2ud0.execute-api.ca-central-1.amazonaws.com&& npm --workspace mobile run build:web && cd mobile && aws s3 sync dist s3://mealmatch-frontend-staging --delete --region ca-central-1 --no-cli-pager && aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id E2M4AWGSW0WDVY --paths "/*" --no-cli-pager
scripts.deploy:web:prod: npm --workspace mobile run build:web && cd mobile && aws s3 sync dist s3://mealmatch-frontend-prod --delete --region ca-central-1 --no-cli-pager
